ideation: This sequence aims to capture the ethereal and playful nature of a fairy. The animation will feature light, flowing arm movements, suggesting a whimsical and magical feel. The arms will move in a way that complements the delicate and graceful image associated with fairies.  Frame 1 begins with both arms gently raised to the sides, palms facing forward, creating a welcoming and open stance. Frame 2 then sees the left arm moving upward and slightly forward as if sprinkling magical dust, while the right arm swings gently to the side. Frame 3 shows the left arm returning to the side, and the right arm moving up slightly as if mimicking the motion of flight or the gentle fluttering of wings. Frame 4 will show the left arm moving upward and forward once more, completing a gentle circular motion, while the right arm moves down slightly, creating a sense of balance. Finally, frame 5 shows the arms returning to a relaxed position at the sides, mimicking the calm after a magical flourish.

frames.beat: arms lift gracefully, palms open to the world
left arm sprinkles magic, right arm sways gently
left arm settles, right arm flutters like wings
left arm traces a gentle arc, right arm balances
arms return to rest, a soft magical calm
